'''Ilov Maas''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] who represented [[Delphon/Legends|Delphon]] in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He was a vocal supporter of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], a trait that he instilled in his daughter, [[Nima Maas|Nima]].<ref name="GC6" />

{{Char-stub}}
